REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT NAJIB EID SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SALIBA, NAJIB SALIBA'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. CROSS-COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INDEMNITY FOR ONE OF THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS (RE: DOWN-PAYMENT), WHICH IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE IN ALL CAUSES OF ACTION IN DEFENDANTS' THIRD AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT AND FORMS THE BASIS FOR THEIR CLAIMED DAMAGES. WHETHER PLAINTIFF WILL BE FOUND LIABLE FOR INTENTIONAL TORT IS NOT AN ISSUE THAT CAN BE ADDRESSED AT THIS STAGE OF THE LITIGATION. THE COURT ASSUMES THAT LANGUAGE APPEARING AT PAGE 3 ON LINES 5 AND 6 OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS A TYPOGRAPHICAL ERROR "BREACHING HIS DUTIES TO PAUL AND NAJIB" AND CROSS-COMPLAINT SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER TO FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT TO CORRECT THE ERROR. DEFENDANTS SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS THEREAFTER TO FILE AN ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT NAJIB EID SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SALIBA, NAJIB SALIBA's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT

OVERRULED. Cross-complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for indemnity for one of the alleged misrepresentations (re: down-payment), which is incorporated by reference in all causes of action in Defendants' Third Amended Cross-Complaint and forms the basis for their claimed damages. Whether Plaintiff will be found liable for intentional tort is not an issue that can be addressed at this stage of the litigation. The Court assumes that language appearing at page 3 on lines 5 and 6 of the Cross-Complaint is a typographical error "breaching his duties to Paul and Najib" and Cross-Complaint shall have 10 days from notice of entry of this order to file and serve an amendment to complaint to correct the error. Defendants shall have 10 days thereafter to file an answer.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
